Hello everyone~ [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]

[The best of delivery food]

Ta-da! It's all set up
It's from "It's Pasta!"
They specialize in delivery
Let's go over the dishes
Vongola Pasta
Spicy Cream Pasta

Plate Brisket Jjampong

Gambas comes with 3 slices of bread, but I took 1 out just to fit everything
Bon appetit
The eggs came with the Chopped Steak, but I moved them here
Let's return it

So I had it a couple of times already
The Spicy Cream Pasta is their best-selling item
The cream sauce is a brown-like color
Pasta must be eaten with a fork
Whatever [Koreans use chopsticks]
[Seat claimed]

It's tasty
How come I didn't order this before?
The sauce is amazing
Can't believe I never had this before
Lots of ingredients as well
I'm not good at eating spicy foods, so I avoid ordering them
That's why I never gave this dish a try
I think it's the best
There's some chili pepper in here
It's not too spicy Spicy enough to give a fresh taste
Rosé this time This one's good
Bacon..
I love this feeling
Check out the color
Well mixed
Yum

There are a lot of rosé dishes out there And I tried most of them
But this one feels different
Like a creamy tomato flavor
Its quality is different
Vongola Pasta
First time trying this as well
The noodles seem to be thinner
It's not dry

This might be great for a hangover cure

This is for a hangover cure
There are so many clams
Let's just use chopsticks

Definitely some spice

Plate Brisket Jjampong
Plate brisket
Nothing for yo

When did you come here?
I can taste the smokiness just from that 1 bite
The smoky flavor is amazing
Better than Jjampong
Definitely order this if you're craving Jjampong

Now that I've tried all of them
Plate Brisket Jjampong or the Spicy Cream Pasta

This will go well with rice too
I'm gonna have to go with this one

Let's try it again
Yes, this one

Yummy

Buffalo wings too
